underlying_goal: Implement a complete SIA DC-09 message parser in Go for an alarm receiver system, covering CRC, length, ID, sequence, account, data parsing, timestamp handling, tests, and documentation as part of Jira ticket AR-76
friction_detail: Multiple minor bugs caught during review including missing advance() calls, indexing errors, missing bounds checks, and Go time.Parse inability to handle SIA timestamp format requiring manual parsing.
brief_summary: User implemented a full SIA DC-09 message parser function-by-function across a long session with Claude's help, completing ticket AR-76 with tests, docs, and a GitHub PR despite several minor bugs caught along the way.
